overallScore.method: mean of 15 dimension final scores after R1/R2/R3 revisions

WIRING.contestedRound: R2 Pair1 (8 vs 4); R3 cross-exam revised A1 from 8 to 5

PROPERTY_CORRECTNESS.contestedRound: R2 Pair3 (1 vs 3); R3 cross-exam resolved A1 at 2
PROPERTY_CORRECTNESS.note: Mean includes A6 (Attacker) score of 5 based on cryptographic property correctness; all others scored 1-4 based on propertyBasedTests=0. Without A6 outlier, mean=2.56.

OPERATIONAL_READINESS.contestedRound: R2 Pair5 (4 vs 3); no consensus override; mean reflects both positions

SECURITY_POSTURE.contestedRound: R2 Pair4 (5 vs 6); R3 cross-exam confirmed floor=5

SHIP_READINESS.contestedRound: R2 Pair1 (5 vs 3); no consensus override

maturityPlacement.cncfRationale: No production deployment, 0 confirmed organizations using in production, single contributor, no published artifact adoption metrics.

doraMetrics.deployFrequency: commits to main only — no production deployment pipeline measured
doraMetrics.changeFailureRate: 0 true reverts — not applicable; system has no production history

maturityPlacement.doraRationale: Median lead time 112 hours vs Elite < 1 hour. MTTR=null. Deployment frequency measures git commits, not production releases.

topRisks.title: server.ts (1450 lines, HTTP attack surface) has zero tests — POST /api/v1/god-mode/execute never tested for auth bypass
Empty jwtSecret produces startup warning not process exit — silent misconfiguration path to unauthenticated server operation
22 confirmed dead exports — 17 tool exports and 5 of 6 routing strategies
42% of packages (11/26) have zero test files including server, gateway, and onboard
Unbounded taskEventQueue at loop.ts:242 — 170 unbounded push calls, confirmed OOM vector
80% of test files (37/46) skip error conditions — agent loop and KAIROS loop have no error path tests
Zero runbooks — verified absent by grep across docs/
No production deployment — MTTR=null, all DORA metrics are commit-velocity not operational
5 synchronous IO hot paths block Node.js event loop in agent loop and memory manager
Code coverage measurement disabled — 661 tests provide no measurable line coverage

strengths.title: Zero CVEs across all severity levels — npm audit passes clean
strengths.evidence: security.json dependencyAudit: total=0, critical=0, high=0, moderate=0, low=0

strengths.title: 12 wiring points confirmed with specific file:line citations
strengths.evidence: static-analysis.json wiringAudit: all 12 wired=true with callSite references

strengths.title: AES-256-GCM + Argon2id at OWASP recommended parameters with derived key zeroed after use
strengths.evidence: security.json vaultSystem: encryption and KDF correctly parameterized

strengths.title: 661 tests pass across 15 of 26 packages — 0 failures
ChangeSet state machine enforces simulation->approval->execution for all destructive actions
strengths.evidence: architecture.json stateMachines: ChangeSet states=[pending, approved, rejected, executed]

strengths.title: 22 registered security middlewares with distinct non-overlapping purposes including egress-monitor, trust-propagation, and content-injection-filter
Pino structured logging (NDJSON to stderr) with Sentry PII scrubbing configured
Foundation layer (shared, config, db) has correct instability metrics — 0.00, 0.08, 0.08
strengths.evidence: architecture.json coupling: Foundation packages are correctly stable

immediate.action: Change server.ts empty jwtSecret from console.warn to process.exit(1)
immediate.rationale: R03 + R04: The unauthenticated server startup path requires one line of code to close. This is the highest severity finding with the lowest effort fix.

immediate.action: Add 3 integration tests to server.ts: unauthenticated 401, JWT alg:none rejected, expired token rejected
immediate.rationale: R03: POST /api/v1/god-mode/execute has never been tested. These 3 tests establish a minimum security gate for the primary attack surface.

immediate.action: Cap taskEventQueue at 1000 entries in loop.ts:242 with backpressure event
immediate.rationale: R06: 10-line fix that closes a confirmed OOM vector in the agent loop hot path.

immediate.action: Enable vitest coverage with v8 provider — measure baseline before setting targets
immediate.rationale: R11: This single action converts 661 opaque tests into a measurable asset. Run once to see actual coverage, then decide target thresholds.

oneWeek.action: Write 3 minimum runbooks: (1) startup and health verification, (2) vault unlock failure recovery, (3) API key rotation
oneWeek.rationale: R07: Zero runbooks is the single largest operational gap. These 3 documents cover the most likely failure modes a sysadmin would encounter.

oneWeek.action: Delete or wire the 22 dead exports across tools and router — start with the 5 dead routing strategies
oneWeek.rationale: R01: 83% of the router package's primary API is dead code. Delete or activate. Dead code in a security-critical tool package cannot remain indefinitely.

oneWeek.action: Add error-path tests to loop.integration.test.ts: provider 503, tool crash, context overflow
oneWeek.rationale: R26: The agent loop has no error-path tests despite being the most critical execution path.

oneWeek.action: Convert memory/dream-runner.ts and memory/manager.ts file operations to async fs/promises
oneWeek.rationale: R10: These two files are the highest-frequency synchronous IO paths in the system. Converts blocking I/O to non-blocking without changing semantics.

oneWeek.action: Add 10 property-based tests using fast-check: router Thompson sampling invariants and vault crypto round-trip
oneWeek.rationale: R08: These are the highest-value targets with clear invariants. Thompson sampling expected reward bounds and vault encrypt/decrypt round-trip.

oneMonth.action: Deploy to a staging environment — record first production deployment timestamp
oneMonth.rationale: R05: All DORA metrics are meaningless without a deployed environment. MTTR=null and a DORA Low classification follow from having no production system.

oneMonth.action: Deploy the 11 monitoring-manifest monitors and verify Sentry DSN receives real events
oneMonth.rationale: R17: Monitoring-manifest.json is setup instructions. Converting it to deployed monitors takes the alerting from designed to operational.

oneMonth.action: Add smoke tests for the 3 highest-risk zero-test packages: server (health endpoint), gateway (structured response), scheduler (job registers and fires)
oneMonth.rationale: R02: 42% of packages have zero tests. These 3 packages are operationally critical and each needs only one smoke test as a minimum.

oneMonth.action: Write 3 SLO definition documents (not code metrics): CLI startup time, vault unlock per session, first chat token latency
oneMonth.rationale: R18: SLO documents link operational targets to monitoring thresholds. Each SLO document should reference the monitoring-manifest.json monitor that detects its breach.

oneMonth.action: Fix the 3 cross-layer architecture violations: core->agents, core->tools, mcp->tools
oneMonth.rationale: R12: These violations compound as each layer grows. The longer they persist, the more expensive each fix becomes. Fix core->agents first (lowest blast radius).

oneMonth.action: Add Dependabot or Renovate configuration with high/critical CVE merge block policy
oneMonth.rationale: R20: The 0-CVE state is a point-in-time snapshot. Without automation, a new CVE disclosure goes undetected until the next manual npm audit.

oneMonth.action: Enable the 21 skipped Docker sandbox tests in a dedicated CI job
oneMonth.rationale: R09: The process isolation layer that prevents agent execution escapes is the only Docker-tested code path. It currently does not run in standard CI.
